item.title: 电脑中毒了？只需8分钟！一步步教你彻底清除顽固病毒！！| 零度解说

item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aA2xvs6aDc8 【更多资源】▶https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCvijahEyGtvMpmMHBu4FS2w?sub_confirmation=1 【零度博客】▶https://www.freedidi.com 【加入会员】▶https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCvijahEyGtvMpmMHBu4FS2w/join ------------------------------------- 🔔 一键清理病毒的Tron脚本下载：https://www.freedidi.com/12992.html 🐙🥇⛱️🌈 零度高级会员：https://vip.freedidi.com 🔰 安全VPN推荐（最高优惠链接）： 1.ExpressVPN：https://go.expressvpn.com/c/2612933/1645830/16063 2.PureVPN： https://billing.purevpn.com/aff.php?aff=44074 🚀VPS 推荐： 1.https://bittly.cc/Vultr （优惠链接） 2.https://bandwagonhost.com/aff.php?aff=58794 （CN2 GIA 全网高速线路） 🦞 AI 生成对口型视频（支持多语言）：https://bittly.cc/rHFM3 🐳我的下载工具：https://bittly.cc/idm 💓 1.回国加速VPN ：https://bittly.cc/qt8cx 💰比特币交易平台 1.火币官网 : https://www.htx-kol.com/invite/zh-cn/1g?invite_code=48tr7 接码平台推荐: https://sms-activate.org/?ref=4203005 ======================= 其它更多精彩内容推荐：😍 https://youtu.be/h5rUawU0R04 https://youtu.be/kuWCMrKk9m4 https://youtu.be/4FWDFhTB6Yk https://youtu.be/2G-Emzf29BU https://youtu.be/UDGdZaoz77A https://youtu.be/N3CTgtz3GMc https://youtu.be/nSDz2W7SbOk https://youtu.be/4YIz_P25iTI https://youtu.be/DO8HZ6_pWqI https://youtu.be/PgLDCgEIX40 https://youtu.be/vX51savENcs https://youtu.be/ecfrVMlsvO4 https://youtu.be/3kWqECtHg1E https://youtu.be/absq9kTV_NM https://youtu.be/5ymZYqEWlOA https://youtu.be/L_d5WRlzDYE https://youtu.be/eKCvwvhGo5I https://youtu.be/EX7SrTaCqQo https://youtu.be/MS4FpJA6RBI https://youtu.be/5ymZYqEWlOA https://youtu.be/4TAufWfiCoQ https://youtu.be/47vMjLqMHh8 https://youtu.be/OpYYFGJPr0A =========================

item.title: Windows 10/11 爆发蓝屏死机！元凶竟是 CrowdStrike，附最新修复方法及推荐最稳定系统版本 | 零度解说
item.itunes:title: Windows 10/11 爆发蓝屏死机！元凶竟是 CrowdStrike，附最新修复方法及推荐最稳定系统版本 | 零度解说
item.itunes:author: 零度解说
item.itunes:summary:
# 导致这次大范围蓝屏死机的原因

# 官方的蓝屏修复方案

# 更多蓝屏死机的解决方法

# 个人电脑如何选择稳定版本

# 下载Windows 11 最新LTSC长期服务版

# 安装 Windows 11 长期稳定版

# 稳定多版本选择

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dhQyv-6q8Vs

【更多资源】▶https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCvijahEyGtvMpmMHBu4FS2w?sub_confirmation=1

【零度博客】▶https://www.freedidi.com

【加入会员】▶https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCvijahEyGtvMpmMHBu4FS2w/join

-------------------------------------

1.修复CrowdStrike 导致的蓝屏死机问题：https://www.freedidi.com/12976.html

2.Windows 11 （24H2）LTSC长期服务版下载：https://www.freedidi.com/11998.html

3.Rufus 工具下载：https://www.freedidi.com/1212.html

🐙🥇⛱️🌈

零度高级会员：https://vip.freedidi.com

🔰 安全VPN推荐（最高优惠链接）：

1.ExpressVPN：https://go.expressvpn.com/c/2612933/1645830/16063

2.PureVPN： https://billing.purevpn.com/aff.php?aff=44074

🚀VPS 推荐：

1.https://bittly.cc/Vultr （优惠链接）

2.https://bandwagonhost.com/aff.php?aff=58794 （CN2 GIA 全网高速线路）

🦞

AI 生成对口型视频（支持多语言）：https://bittly.cc/rHFM3

🐳我的下载工具：https://bittly.cc/idm

1.回国加速VPN ：https://bittly.cc/qt8cx

item.title: 告别系统臃肿！只需3步，让Windows 11/10焕发新生，性能飙升！！| 零度解说

item.title: Open AI 发布 Sora 最新作品视频，看懂的可以评论下 | 零度解说
item.itunes:title: Open AI 发布 Sora 最新作品视频，看懂的可以评论下 | 零度解说
item.itunes:author: 零度解说
item.itunes:summary:
you show your. soul show me your. soul only if you. [Music]. deare sometimes we. fall sometimes we fall.

[Music]. sometimes we. fall sometimes we. fall you thought it I forgot you thought. it I forget just time and time again. I'll do the same.

mistake do to know where I've been on. where you've beening around forgetting I. even here at all. come. [Music]. on leave your.

B see me. again I've been. waiting to. feel. alive from me. [Music].

now I'm calling on your name. [Music]. [Music]. [Music]. even though our time is short PE of me. is yours.

[Music]. always love. covers wake. up not enough then you leave alone some. days. [Music].

so even though our time short piece of. me is yours. [Music]. always. covers wake up. not enough then you leave in your some.

days so. [Music]. L cuz I don't change me now cuz I li cuz. I let it be myself if you're not agree. you can walk away you can walk away you. can walk away.

====

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8ykwH4g7m6U

item.description:
you show your. soul show me your. soul only if you. [Music]. deare sometimes we. fall sometimes we fall.

[Music]. sometimes we. fall sometimes we. fall you thought it I forgot you thought. it I forget just time and time again. I'll do the same.

mistake do to know where I've been on. where you've beening around forgetting I. even here at all. come. [Music]. on leave your.

B see me. again I've been. waiting to. feel. alive from me. [Music].

now I'm calling on your name. [Music]. [Music]. [Music]. even though our time is short PE of me. is yours.

[Music]. always love. covers wake. up not enough then you leave alone some. days. [Music].

so even though our time short piece of. me is yours. [Music]. always. covers wake up. not enough then you leave in your some.

days so. [Music]. L cuz I don't change me now cuz I li cuz. I let it be myself if you're not agree. you can walk away you can walk away you. can walk away.

====

item.content:encoded:
you show your. soul show me your. soul only if you. [Music]. deare sometimes we. fall sometimes we fall.

[Music]. sometimes we. fall sometimes we. fall you thought it I forgot you thought. it I forget just time and time again. I'll do the same.

mistake do to know where I've been on. where you've beening around forgetting I. even here at all. come. [Music]. on leave your.

B see me. again I've been. waiting to. feel. alive from me. [Music].

now I'm calling on your name. [Music]. [Music]. [Music]. even though our time is short PE of me. is yours.

[Music]. always love. covers wake. up not enough then you leave alone some. days. [Music].

so even though our time short piece of. me is yours. [Music]. always. covers wake up. not enough then you leave in your some.

days so. [Music]. L cuz I don't change me now cuz I li cuz. I let it be myself if you're not agree. you can walk away you can walk away you. can walk away.

====
